commands.summary: [AC-1] src/logic.ts: gradeMcq + isMultiSelect; scoreMock uses gradeMcq
[AC-1] src/App.tsx: shared MCQ helpers; Practice + Mock render role=checkbox with .mcq-hint
[AC-1] src/content/validate.ts + scripts/validate-content.mjs: validateMcqAnswer enforces >=2 distinct in-range indices that don't cover every option
[AC-2] 4 multi-select questions appended per track (aplus-q387..390, netplus-q176..179, secplus-q194..197)
[AC-2] npm run validate:content -> Content valid: 764 questions across 3 certifications
[AC-3] src/logic.test.ts: MCQ grading (single + multi-select) and a multi-select scoreMock case
[AC-3] npm test -> 65 passed; npm run build -> ok; npm run validate:a11y -> passed
[AC-3] Browser verification: Mock-exam multi-select renders checkboxes, hint, and holds 2 simultaneous selections with no console errors
[AC-4] Scope decision (2026-06-20): deliver multi-select MCQ + seed content this item; other formats and bulk authoring tracked separately.

environment.process_note: Inline acceptance-criterion evidence migrated to a formal evidence/runs record during the canonical RepoPact 1.6.0 migration (decision 0007). Original entries preserved verbatim in commands[].summary, prefixed by criterion id.
